title: [ETC] Crash with null operand in instnace
body:
```
hw.module.extern private @Baz(%a: i1) -> (b: i1)  
  hw.module @SomeExtracted(%clock: i1, %in: i1) -> (out0: i1) {
    %and = comb.and %in, %clock: i1
    %baz.dead = hw.instance "baz" @Baz(a: %and: i1) -> (b: i1)
    sv.always posedge %clock {
      sv.cover %and, immediate
    }
    hw.output %in: i1
  }
```
ETC produces the following error:
```
test.mlir:4:17: error: null operand found
    %baz.dead = hw.instance "baz" @Baz(a: %and: i1) -> (b: i1)
                ^
test.mlir:4:17: note: see current operation: %0 = "hw.instance"(<<NULL VALUE>>) {argNames = ["a"], instanceName = "baz", moduleName = @Baz, parameters = [], resultNames = ["b"]} : (<<NULL TYPE>>) -> i1
```
`%and` is mistakenly deleted since `%and` is used by test code and dead external module.
